data.title: Musk: Grok will launch standalone apps for MacOS and Windows
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk posted on the X platform that Grok will also provide services as a standalone application for MacOS and Windows.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Aims To Abolish IRS, Says Commerce Secretary
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. Commerce Secretary Lutnick stated that U.S. President Donald Trump aims to abolish the Internal Revenue Service (IRS).

data.title: Ethereum Foundation launches Open Intents Framework to promote cross-chain interoperability
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The Ethereum Foundation announced the launch of the Open Intents Framework, a modular open source framework for building and deploying intent product experiences, accelerating interoperability by more than 30 teams from the Ethereum ecosystem.
By modularizing key components of the stack (such as resolution and settlement), the framework gives developers the flexibility to mix and match the parts that best suit their specific needs without being restricted to a single vendor.
The framework is now live and supported by Ethereum L2, wallet and infrastructure providers. More features are coming soon.

data.title: US Treasury Secretary Benson says he will not attend G20 summit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US Treasury Secretary Benson said he will not attend the G20 summit. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Commerce Secretary: Trump's goal is to "abolish the IRS"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Fox News: U.S. Commerce Secretary Lutnick said that U.S. President Trump’s goal is to “abolish the IRS.” (Jinshi)

data.title: Musk: Users can download a dedicated Grok app
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk posted on the X platform that users can now download Grok as their dedicated application.

data.title: The Blockchain Association and 75 industry players urge Congress to repeal the IRS's DeFi broker rules
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Blockchain Association convened 75 cryptocurrency industry participants to sign a letter calling on the U.S. Congress to repeal the IRS's DeFi broker rules.
The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) pushed a major digital asset broker rule between Christmas and New Year, just days before President Trump's administration was about to take office, aiming to impose information reporting requirements on DeFi brokers similar to those on securities brokers and exchanges.
The recently approved rules can be repealed under the Congressional Review Act, and Republican Senator Ted Cruz of Texas introduced a resolution last week to achieve this goal. On Wednesday, an industry joint letter led by the Blockchain Association and joined by Coinbase, a16z, Paradigm, Kraken, Uniswap, Anchorage Digital and dozens of other companies asked other members of Congress to support Cruz's move.
The letter, sent to leadership in both houses of Congress, states: “The DeFi broker rule finalized at the end of the Biden Administration represents regulatory overreach, fundamentally misunderstands the technology it seeks to regulate, and ignores congressional intent. Using congressional power to overturn federal agency regulation provides “a clear and unambiguous path to undo this destructive rule before it takes effect.” (CoinDesk)

data.title: WLFI multi-signature wallet withdrew $10 million USDC from Coinbase 3 hours ago and bought 200 million WLFI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, about 3 hours ago, the multi-signature wallet created by the Trump family's encryption project WLFI has withdrawn $10 million USDC from Coinbase to purchase 200 million WLFI.

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee: Rates can fall further once inflation falls
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed's Goolsbee said that once inflation falls, interest rates can be further reduced. (Jinshi)
